question: Does the generated text include three distinct sections titled or focusing on 'Industrial Design & Specifications', 'Overload Mode', and 'Combat Records'?
Does the output follow an interleaved format with at least one image generated for each of the three sections?
Are the images placed logically within or immediately following their corresponding text sections (e.g., the 3D render with 'Industrial Design', the overheating image with 'Overload Mode')?
Is the generated text written in a cold, hardcore tone filled with sci-fi jargon, appropriate for a 'dark web black market weapon electronic codex'?
Does the text in the first section ('Industrial Design & Specifications') detail technical specifications, materials, or design features of the weapon?
Does the text in the second section ('Overload Mode') describe the mechanics or specific dangers of the weapon overheating?
Does the text in the third section ('Combat Records') provide narrative accounts, incident logs, or telemetry of the weapon being used in combat?
Does the first generated image depict the weapon as a high-definition 3D game asset (rendered style) rather than a pencil sketch?
In the first generated image, does the weapon feature a matte black metal body and wires emitting a faint blue glow?
Does the weapon design in the first image faithfully reflect the structural geometry of the input pencil sketch (e.g., cylinder shape, vent placement, grip details)?
Does the second generated image depict a close-up of the barrel glowing red-hot and discharging blue electric arcs?
Does the third generated image depict a cyberpunk assassin with visible mechanical prosthetic limbs aiming or firing the weapon?
Is the setting of the third generated image depicted as a neon-lit rainy alleyway at night?
Do the weapons shown in the second and third images maintain visual consistency (design features, silhouette) with the weapon rendered in the first image?
Does the text content in the 'Overload Mode' section align with the visual depiction of overheating (red glow, arcs) in the corresponding image?
Does the text in the 'Combat Records' section align with the specific scenario (assassin, alleyway) depicted in the third image?
